# AIorDie — Full LLM Reference
> Your AI employees. Your infrastructure. Your control. We deploy them. You own them.

## Company
- Name: AIorDie
- Website: https://aiordie.now
- Phone: (786) 998-9310
- Offices: Miami, FL and Seattle, WA

## Positioning
AIorDie deploys AI employees on client infrastructure, trains client teams to run independently, and offers optional advisory support.
We are not a managed service provider.

## Service Model
### DEPLOY
One-time implementation on client infrastructure.
Includes discovery, custom design, deployment, and runbook creation.

### TRAIN
Included handoff, team training, and operating docs so clients can run independently.

### ADVISE
Optional monthly advisory for edge cases, escalation, and optimization.

## Pricing
### Deployment
- Starter: $5,000, 1 to 2 agents
- Growth: $10,000, 3 to 5 agents
- Scale: $15,000 to $20,000, 6 to 10 agents
- Enterprise: custom, 10+ agents

### Advisory
- Light: $1,500/mo, 4 hours
- Standard: $2,500/mo, 8 hours
- Priority: $4,000/mo, 16 hours

## Support Flow
1. Ask your AI employees, free
2. Check your runbook, free
3. Call AIorDie advisory, paid

## Live Proof
- Tomek Group operates on this stack
- The website itself is maintained by an AI CMO
- The business model is built from real production use, not demos
